data.content: Plan review rejected: changing SelectContent default to popper looks feasible and likely addresses the bulk-edit/filter jitter, but the plan does not satisfy acceptance criterion 5. Replace the source-level contract-only test with a browser-level Playwright or equivalent assertion that records scroll position and nearby element bounding boxes before and after opening each pulldown in Queues View, including bulk-edit selects, filter selects, and the Repositories dropdown.
